title: hieracium × variifurcum
intro: Hieracium × variifurcum, also known as Hieracium pilosella, is a hybrid plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its small, dandelion-like flowers and variable leaf forms. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium × variifurcum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Hieracium × variifurcum can be prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
